Beyond its flagship DEX trading platform, the ecosystem supports borrowing, lending, real world assets (RWAs), and a full-fledged Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), making it a leading force in decentralized finance (defi)."}}}},{"item":{"id":"polkadot","coin_id":12171,"name":"Polkadot","symbol":"DOT","market_cap_rank":45,"thumb":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/12171/standard/polkadot.jpg?1766533446","small":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/12171/small/polkadot.jpg?1766533446","large":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/12171/large/polkadot.jpg?1766533446","slug":"polkadot","price_btc":1.5908851747223483e-05,"score":7,"data":{"price":1.1818352107289039,"price_btc":"0.00001590885174722348","price_change_percentage_24h":{"aed":1.163061905965413,"ars":-1.040093604697531,"aud":0.5404934753905666,"bch":-1.5808471570416174,"bdt":1.3152942655745792,"bhd":1.1906908001417504,"bmd":1.1630619059653937,"bnb":-1.5326195584959328,"brl":1.0437539192292014,"btc":-3.538161390738656,"cad":0.6075055879665595,"chf":0.06442279950326112,"clp":0.5442373289205784,"cny":0.9513431690998047,"czk":0.46490714229391733,"dkk":0.5080169464758773,"dot":0.0,"eos":-1.2774304659723048,"eth":-6.222165331077596,"eur":0.5093305706777892,"gbp":0.339528577339453,"gel":1.196268963089195,"hkd":1.159897539198546,"huf":-0.7454072023931435,"idr":1.2557479223278485,"ils":0.6289045126461458,"inr":1.2324686701335934,"jpy":0.8070486034281817,"krw":0.7560900067683852,"kwd":1.1522567900036729,"lkr":1.205257003095328,"ltc":0.14727279232474974,"mmk":1.1630619059653529,"mxn":0.650528759575916,"myr":0.6794543638309755,"ngn":1.11541511927982,"nok":0.32093407381639766,"nzd":0.3643021008370978,"php":0.33264703274759944,"pkr":1.3102279027220474,"pln":0.2969264735710366,"rub":-0.3337394136304649,"sar":1.2870508326751717,"sek":-0.45383808264334474,"sgd":0.9617131953823922,"sol":-3.4324389946204867,"thb":0.5486415243977645,"try":1.2035737515995164,"twd":0.676658072842174,"uah":1.2103598751545477,"usd":1.1630619059653937,"vef":1.1630619059654166,"vnd":1.140020115268424,"xag":-1.835524493870581,"xau":0.25559853019784656,"xdr":1.3838758916513676,"xlm":-1.3603029808251574,"xrp":-1.4745790904653853,"yf
